case_title: SOUTH BEACH HARBOR - PORT OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. MICHAEL BIRD ET AL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-29-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-29-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ERIC GROVER. PLAINTIFF SOUTH BEACH HARBOR - PORT OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ALVIN SONZA, HARBOR MASTER, AND PALLAVI TALWAR, JR. ANALYST. PLAINTIFF'S GAVE ORAL AUTHORIZATION FOR THE CASE TO BE HEARD BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM. DEFENDANT MICHAEL BIRD IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT OTTO BIRD IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) PALLAVI TALWAR, JR. ANALYST FILED BY PLAINTIFF SOUTH BEACH HARBOR - PORT OF SAN FRANCISCO
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ALVIN SONZA, HARBOR MASTER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SOUTH BEACH HARBOR - PORT OF SAN FRANCISCO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-29-2023 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SOUTH BEACH HARBOR - PORT OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BIRD, MICHAEL CO-OWNER & CO-LICENSEE BIRD, OTTO CO-OWNER & CO-LICENSEE $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,080.00, DEFENDANT PROVED ITS CASE BY A PREPONDERANCE OF THE EVIDENCE. DEFENDANT MICHAEL BIRD AND OTTO BIRD ARE JOINTLY LIABLE FOR THE AMOUNT OF $5000 IN BACK BERTH RENTAL FEES AND $80 IN COURT COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SOUTH BEACH HARBOR - PORT OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT BIRD, MICHAEL CO-OWNER & CO-LICENSEE BIRD, OTTO CO-OWNER & CO-LICENSEE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-29-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
